objectives.text: One hundred citizens, Mayor! ONE HUNDRED! What was once a lonely camp in the wilderness is now a thriving village! We have farms, mines, shops, guard towers, schools... We have it all! The citizens are celebrating in the streets!

result.text: The people have already started celebrating! They organized a festival in your honor. Market stalls, games, music! And they pooled together a generous reward for the greatest mayor this land has ever seen!

options.answer: Every one of those citizens matters!

result.text: And that is exactly why they love you! Here, the village council insisted you take this as thanks for your dedication!

objectives.text: A hundred souls, all thriving under your leadership. But do not rest on your laurels, Mayor. I have heard whispers of even greater achievements ahead!
